rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree blocks for component type contracts with visible feature names.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must reference visible identifiers from the AADL model.
Component type contracts should avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths.
Range assumptions should use concrete bounds or named constants when available.
Boolean expressions in AGREE must align with the actual AADL data types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `eq` declarations for helper variables in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE expressions and AADL port types.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Avoid using opaque Boolean or enumeration data in numeric range comparisons.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
